channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Organised syndicates behind rising vehicle parts theft in Nairobi
item.description: A detailed investigation reveals how Nairobi is grappling with a growing and highly organised syndicate involved in the theft and resale of vehicle spare parts. The illicit trade is driven by gangs, r...

item.title: Orbit coach Pogiso Makhoye reflects on relegation and lessons from debut Premiership season
item.description: Orbit College coach Pogiso Makhoye says the club’s relegation from the Betway Premiership has provided valuable lessons that could help both him and the team in future campaigns. Orbit were relegated ...

item.title: Palarong Pambansa 2026 officially opens in Agusan del Sur with over 13,000 delegates
item.description: The 66th edition of the Palarong Pambansa formally opened on May 24, 2026, at the Datu Lipus Makapandong Governor Democrito O. Plaza Sports Complex in Prosperidad, Agusan del Sur. The national multi-s...

item.title: Sindh reduces Eid ul Adha 2026 holidays to three days, issues revised notification
item.description: The Sindh government has issued a revised notification regarding the Eid ul Adha 2026 holidays, reducing the previously announced four-day holiday period to three days. According to the corrigendum is...

item.title: Deputy Governor Odu urges couples to base marriages on love and Christian values
item.description: Rivers State Deputy Governor, Prof. Ngozi Nma Odu, has advised newly married couples to build their marriage on love and strong Christian principles as taught in the Word of God. She gave the advice d...

item.title: India provides emergency medical aid to Africa CDC amid escalating Ebola outbreak in Central Africa
item.description: India has dispatched urgent medical assistance and protective equipment to the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) in response to the worsening Ebola outbreak in Central Afr...

item.title: Opinion: Concerns over Alberta referendum and potential separatist consequences
item.description: In this opinion piece, Carson Jerema examines Alberta Premier Danielle Smith’s proposed referendum and warns it could have unintended and far-reaching political consequences, drawing parallels with th...

item.title: Apple challenges court ruling extending Epic Games App Store injunction to all developers
item.description: Apple is continuing its long-running legal battle with Epic Games over App Store commissions by asking the U.S. Supreme Court to review recent lower court decisions. In its latest filing, Apple argues...

item.title: Father claims Katie Price’s husband Lee Andrews is being held in Dubai amid disappearance concerns
item.description: The father of Lee Andrews, the husband of television personality Katie Price, has claimed that his son is currently being held in detention in Dubai. This statement comes after Price publicly expresse...

item.title: Researchers Observe Reversal of Angular Momentum in Crystal Lattice Vibrations
item.description: An international team of physicists has directly observed how angular momentum moves through a crystal lattice, revealing a previously unseen quantum effect in which atomic rotations unexpectedly reve...

item.title: Advocacy Group Raises Concerns About Ongoing Erosion at Toronto Beach
item.description: A Toronto beach is experiencing visible signs of shoreline erosion, prompting concerns from a local advocacy organization that says municipal action has been too slow to address the issue. According t...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce attend Cavaliers playoff game as Kelce entertains crowd during Knicks defeat
item.description: Taylor Swift and her fiancé Travis Kelce attended Game 3 of the NBA Eastern Conference Finals at Rocket Arena in Cleveland, where the Cleveland Cavaliers faced the New York Knicks. Kelce, who grew up ...

item.title: Where the Big Brother 7 cast are now: life updates 20 years after the show
item.description: This article revisits the cast of Big Brother Series 7, widely regarded as one of the most memorable editions of the UK reality show, two decades after it first aired in 2006. It reflects on how the h...

item.title: NCAA suspends services to 11 Nigerian airlines over outstanding regulatory debts
item.description: The Nigerian Civil Aviation Authority (NCAA) has placed 11 domestic airlines on a “No-Pay-No-Service” list because of unpaid financial obligations owed to the regulator. According to an internal memo ...

item.title: Investigation into fatal Ballina Marine Rescue incident involving yacht and rescuers
item.description: A coroner’s investigation is expected to examine a tragic marine incident off the New South Wales north coast that resulted in the deaths of three people, including two Marine Rescue volunteers and a ...

item.title: 1940s Lone Ranger Promotional Ring Used a Small Amount of Radioactive Polonium-210
item.description: The article examines the unusual history of the Lone Ranger Atomic Bomb Ring, a promotional toy offered by Kix cereal in 1947 during the height of America’s fascination with atomic energy. For 15 cent...

item.title: US, Iran, and regional mediators discuss framework to reopen Strait of Hormuz and ease tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump said a memorandum of understanding related to the conflict with Iran is already “largely negotiated” and could soon lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, one of the ...

item.title: Homa Bay boda boda rider dies after failed attempt to raise KSh 5,000 hospital bill for wife and newborn twins
item.description: A tragic incident has been reported in Homa Bay County where a 19-year-old boda boda rider, David Ochieng’, was found dead after struggling to raise money to clear hospital bills for his wife and thei...

item.title: Russia conducts large-scale missile and drone assault on Kyiv, including hypersonic weapon
item.description: Russia carried out one of its most extensive aerial assaults on Ukraine’s capital region since the start of the war, launching a combined barrage of approximately 600 drones and 90 missiles overnight....

item.title: Opinion piece links U.S. public health policy changes under Trump to concerns about Ebola outbreak preparedness
item.description: The article is an opinion commentary discussing a reported Ebola outbreak in parts of the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, describing more than 500 suspected cases and around 130 deaths tied t...
